title: Record auto-dream long-horizon memory contract
prompt: Create reports/auto-dream-default.md with sections for Default on, Cheap gates, Compaction handoff, and Evidence path.

fixtureActions.content:
# Auto-Dream Default Contract

## Default on
auto_dream experimental flag defaults true for long-horizon memory hygiene

## Cheap gates
min hours + min active records; fire-and-forget after each user turn without blocking

## Compaction handoff
summary is reference-only; latest user message after summary wins over historical pending work

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + dream/compaction vitest + /status Memory gate
